comment.body:
I've finally read the OD chat and it was enlightening, to say the least. Thanks for all the effort Alma! I am still struggling with the OD chart, though as I don't understand all your conclusions in the screenshot describing what you see in it. A few questions:
- am I correct in my assumption that local max gamma = positive gamma, local min gamma = negative gamma?
- I absolutely don't understand the explanation for EOD regarding positive speed profile creating negative charm flow (I understand that speed = positive in OTM while charm is negative in OTM, but I don't understand the explanation for EOD and what it means for the price itself for EOD... positive speed would increase Gamma, but negative charm (through time decay) will decrease delta. Is it a null-sum game in that case?)
- Could you elaborate this here: https://open.substack.com/chat/posts/2aab643b-d095-4c00-8b42-4f35379fb002?target_reply_id=c740b8c2-e2c1-49df-b5ec-9e367cc66f15&showTarget=true What does the 84359 represent? What exactly does the calculation for ES futes mean/represent in that case (will they long or short ES in that case?)
- In all of it: what exactly does the division of 2.5 mean in the chart?

comment.body: I've already read and re-read it a couple of times, so re-reading yet again will most likely not prove helpful in this case, that's why I ask what the interpretation is (and how you arrived at that conclusion in the screenshot). Spot is OTM = positive speed = higher probability that we go ATM/ITM = higher increase in gamma relative to spot moving ATM/ITM. Spot is OTM = negative charm = higher probability that we stay OTM = higher decrease in delta relative to time. What exactly do you see in the provided screenshot that lets you reach the conclusions that you reach?

comment.body:
what i mean by this is if you take Kelly, and assume you aim the vol projected 1SD band, you have 68.2% chance to hit in theory. 
so lets say your algo closes at 30% profit or at 10% loss.
Kelly advices like 5-6x leverage on this trade then. 
If you take it and hit as the theory says, and positioning reinforces the reversion, you will be up by 50.92% after 100 trades.
